title: Decide: phased cutover vs all-three-in-one-weekend

deadline.text: decision needed at the next steering

acceptance_criteria: Recommendation written with the risk trade-off stated in one paragraph
Decision recorded on the steering meeting-card with the decision-maker named

latest_update.summary: Mark wants all three apps cut over in a single weekend to minimize business disruption. Team's instinct is phased (OrderHub first, soak, then Billing + Reporting). Need a written recommendation before the 2026-06-10 steering.
